name: vcvoid
author: vyger
description: Unofficial emulation of the DROID CV processing system — runs droid.ini patches. Not affiliated with or supported by Der Mann mit der Maschine.

modules.name: vcvoid master
modules.description: Runs DROID patches (droid.ini) — unofficial emulation of the DROID master; not affiliated with or supported by Der Mann mit der Maschine

modules.name: vcvoid master18
modules.description: Runs DROID patches — MASTER18 emulation (8 CV outs, 2 gate ins, 4 gate outs, USB + 2×TRS MIDI, VCO tuner)

modules.name: vcvoid p2b8
modules.description: P2B8 controller — 2 pots, 8 buttons with LEDs (chain right of the master)

modules.name: vcvoid p4b2
modules.description: P4B2 controller — 4 pots, 2 buttons with LEDs

modules.name: vcvoid p8s8
modules.description: P8S8 controller — 8 sliders with LEDs, 8 toggle switches

modules.name: vcvoid e4
modules.description: E4 controller — 4 endless encoders with push + value rings

modules.name: vcvoid m4
modules.description: M4 controller — 4 motor faders with touch + RGB LEDs

modules.name: vcvoid g8
modules.description: G8 gate expander — 8 gate ins, 8 gate outs (5 V)

modules.name: vcvoid x7
modules.description: X7 expander — USB + TRS MIDI, 4 gate outputs (first in chain, right of the master)
